# Provider Runtime / Adapter SSOT: Public Migration Status

Executable SSOT: [`public-migration-status.riido.json`](public-migration-status.riido.json).

This manifest tracks which Provider Runtime / Adapter surfaces have moved into public riido-daemon.

The reader docs are generated so migration status cannot drift from package, gate, and boundary evidence.

Assertions:

- public migration status reader docs are generated from this manifest
- each concrete provider row has a unique provider_id and existing implementation package
- integration gates are evidence surfaces and skipped gates do not prove filesystem side effects
- migration status does not transfer UI, SaaS, task DB, project, infra, secret, or state ownership into C4
